title: AEC community - board setup
excerpt: I work for an engineering firm and am looking for someone who is familiar with the industry and could help with initial setup of boards for our small marketing team.

posts.author: DEANNAR (Deanna Rodriguez)
posts.cookedHtml: I work for an engineering firm and am looking for someone who is familiar with the industry and could help with initial setup of boards for our small marketing team.

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @DEANNAR!

We at Omnitas Consulting help teams all over the world to get started with monday.com all the the way from analys, design, and also helping with structuring the account as well as training.

Please book me for an initial call where we talk about your needs in order for us to provide a proper quote: https://cal.mixmax.com/thomaskarlsson-305/video-45

posts.author: abklatt (abklatt)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @DEANNAR I would love to hear how you are using Monday! We are struggling with the same thing.

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @abklatt ,

I am a certified monday.com professional and implemented many engineering workflows earlier for my customer. I would love to hear your usecase and implement the best possible solution for you.

You can reach out to me at aquibcs@outlook.com

Best Regards,
Aquib Zafar

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DEANNAR

Welcome to the community!

At upstream, we are proud to offer our expertise as Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners, and we were recently awarded Professional Services Partner of the Year!

Our company is based in Australia, and we have a dedicated and experienced global staff network that can meet your needs. Our Solutions Engineers and full stack Development Team specialise in integrations and custom requirements, and we are confident in our ability to provide valuable support to your organisation.

To schedule a meeting, you can reach me directly at peta@upstreamtech.io or book a meeting with us through the link provided below. We look forward to discussing your objectives and finding ways to help you achieve your goals.

Chat with Peta
International Client - Special Hours

Thank you for considering upstream as your partner, and have a great day ahead!

Kind regards,
Peta
